Metadata.title: Shikaneko · Personal Status Page
Metadata.description: A Shikaneko MVP homepage that blends a personal status page, journal logs and scheduled maintenance.

granules.title: The daily granule strip absorbs the highest-severity incident of each day.
granules.description: Expanded across the last year, with color and hover details driven directly by real incidents and their related components.

components.title: Personal life is split into a few virtual services that can each report health independently.
components.description: Physical condition, emotional core, study flow and art practice each carry their own severity and incident ownership.

recentFeed.title: The latest 10 incidents are grouped by day into a more status-page-like event history.
recentFeed.description: This stream no longer splits by life component. Instead, it shows the newest incidents together with their affected components and every timeline update.
recentFeed.empty: There are no recent incidents to display yet.

normal.label: Normal
normal.description: Everything is running gently and cleanly — a good state to archive as a baseline day.

maintenance.label: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Intentional quiet mode, planned maintenance, or focus windows that should not count as downtime.

notice.label: Notice
notice.description: A mild dip in energy or rhythm has begun to affect the day, but the system still mostly operates.

warning.label: Warning
warning.description: Clear discomfort or emotional drag is reducing capacity and requires active recovery.

critical.label: Critical
critical.description: A hard-stop state where normal operation is no longer realistic and full recovery takes priority.

hero.description: A single incident page brings together the summary, impact window, affected components and all timeline updates.

timeline.title: Timeline updates
timeline.description: Each manual status transition is kept in chronological order so the event reads like a compact journal.

side.title: Quick summary
side.description: A compact side panel that keeps the most important metadata close at hand.

active.title: These incidents are still affecting this component right now.
active.description: Anything not fully closed out yet remains visible in this component's current operational history.

scheduled.title: Planned maintenance windows for this component appear here in advance.
scheduled.description: Scheduled quiet windows still belong to this component's history, but they are not treated as failures.

resolved.title: Finished incidents settle into this component's historical archive.
resolved.description: These entries remain useful as a browsable trail and a gateway to deeper incident details.

empty.active: There are no active incidents affecting this component right now.
empty.scheduled: There is no upcoming maintenance scheduled for this component.
empty.resolved: There are no resolved incidents to revisit for this component yet.
